text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the day of the URA award ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of the year's most illustrious faces gather
there, including...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, Mihono Bourbon, Oguri Cap,
and Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian uses her award acceptance speech to
challenge every racer in attendance to a battle
for the top.
